aboutUs.title: About Gurudev Market
aboutUs.description: Gurudev Market is a new commercial hub near the highway. We offer flexible shops, high visibility, and many amenities for entrepreneurs. Join our vibrant community of businesses and customers!
aboutUs.vision_text: Empowering local businesses and creating a thriving marketplace for all.
aboutUs.mission_text: To provide modern, accessible, and well-equipped shops for entrepreneurs and customers.
aboutUs.owner1_desc: Devendra is passionate about growing local businesses.
aboutUs.owner2_desc: Shailendra has years of experience in commercial real estate.
aboutUs.owner3_desc: Vishnu is dedicated to customer satisfaction and community building.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Gurudev Market
faq.q1: What is the rent for the shops?
faq.a1: The monthly rent for all shops is ₹5,000. This is a competitive rate for prime highway location with all modern facilities.
faq.q2: What is the minimum lease period?
faq.a2: The minimum lease period is 11 months. We also offer flexible renewal options based on your business needs.
faq.a3: All shops come with 24/7 electricity, water supply, clean washrooms, CCTV security, security guard, and ample parking space for customers.
faq.q4: Is there any security deposit required?
faq.a4: Yes, a refundable security deposit equivalent to 2 months rent (₹10,000) is required at the time of booking.
faq.q5: Can I modify the shop interior?
faq.a5: Yes, you can customize the interior of your shop according to your business needs. However, structural changes require prior approval from management.
faq.q6: How do I book a shop?
faq.a6: You can book a shop by visiting our office, calling us at +91-9754265265, or filling out the inquiry form on our website. We'll guide you through the entire process.
faq.more_questions: Still have questions? We're here to help!
